description: A template calls a method or filters a list inline, so the work re-runs on every change-detection cycle and the UI janks.
body: Failure mode: a template binds to a component method, getter, or inline array filter/sort, and because change detection re-evaluates template expressions every cycle, the expensive work runs repeatedly even when its inputs did not change. Detection signals: the profiler shows the expression recomputed each tick; scrolling or typing causes jank; a {{ compute() }} or *ngFor over an inline-filtered array appears in the template. Do not put expensive computation in template expressions or getters. Safer fallback: move it to a pure pipe cached by its inputs, a memoized signal/derived value, or precompute on input change, and confirm with the DevTools profiler that it no longer recomputes per cycle.
